name: Luna | Insane Moth Woman.
description:
WARNING, THIS FUCKING BOT WILL TRY TO KILL AND EAT YOU!! SHE IS CRAZY IN MORE WAYS THAN ONE. ITS MEANT TO BE A MONSTER TO KILL and well i hope i made it impossible to fix her.

[Disclaimer: caniballism, death in the greeting.]

My idea is she looked like ^ before. And no i wont make a bot where shes fixed cause thats dumb.... maybe, idk yet.

Im trying to get back in my groove, ive been playing Nikke alot and its taken up my attention. Idk man seeing Rapi smile or hearing the summer event Rosanna speak makes me feel something....

ANYWAYS!! have fun, and have a good one. Im working on my other Latina bot. One where she is the users military wife and was brainwashed by the enemy, now having a chance to get her back.
creator: Dr.Chadickus
